name: NANNAS CAFE AND BREAD CO (SHARED KITCHEN)

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Food in walk in cooler stored near dripping condensor.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for quat sanitizer tabs and for chlorine dishwasher.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Clean top of dishwasher.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensate line in walk in cooler and walk in freezerneed to be plumbed to a floor drain. Currently draining into bucket.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Locate paper towel dispenser close to handwash sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors walls and ceiling need more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors need repair. Many cracked tiles
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back door has gaps around it.
